_comment: Live-mode bootstrap: the ONLY file the live resolver reads. Mission data itself arrives as named Blocks over NDN. writer_key_hex is the chain writer's pinned Ed25519 public key (trust = the pin); key_seed_hex is THIS reader's 32-byte signing seed.

chains.writer_key_hex: <64 hex chars: iuas-01 companion public key>
<64 hex chars: wuas-01 companion public key>
<64 hex chars: dashboard recorder public key>
